Description
dyntabs.ai
 

  • Uses of AssistantBuilder in dyntabs.ai

    Methods in dyntabs.ai that return AssistantBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> AssistantBuilder<T>
    EasyAI.assistant(Class<T> assistantInterface)
    Starts building an AI Assistant proxy for the given interface.
    AssistantBuilder<T>
    AssistantBuilder.withApiKey(String apiKey)
     
    AssistantBuilder<T>
    AssistantBuilder.withChatLanguageModel(dev.langchain4j.model.chat.ChatLanguageModel model)
     
    AssistantBuilder<T>
    AssistantBuilder.withMemory(int maxMessages)
     
    AssistantBuilder<T>
    AssistantBuilder.withModel(String modelName)
     
    AssistantBuilder<T>
    AssistantBuilder.withRAG(DocumentSource... sources)
    Enables RAG from in-memory document sources (byte arrays).
    AssistantBuilder<T>
    AssistantBuilder.withRAG(String... sources)
    Enables RAG (document-powered AI) with the given document sources.
    AssistantBuilder<T>
    AssistantBuilder.withRAG(String[] sources, int maxResults, double minScore)
    Enables RAG with full control over retrieval parameters.
    AssistantBuilder<T>
    AssistantBuilder.withRAG(List<DocumentSource> sources, int maxResults, double minScore)
    Enables RAG from in-memory document sources with tuning parameters.
    AssistantBuilder<T>
    AssistantBuilder.withSystemMessage(String systemMessage)
     
    AssistantBuilder<T>
    AssistantBuilder.withTools(Object... tools)
    Adds tool objects whose public methods the AI can call.
